_doc: Voiceover for section 04 (refined Text Input + V2 via gpt-image-2-edit). Camera mirrors section 02: tight on TI for prompt streaming → pan to v2 → hold for execute + reveal. No music — added at final stitch.

segments.text: Adding the chibi cues — cream, blush, gold.
Yes. Look at me fly. Now that is handsome.
